title: prasium majus var. minus
intro: Prasium majus var. minus, also known as lesser prasium, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its small leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of lesser prasium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Lesser prasium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
